item.title: Pioneer Vintage SX-727 Stereo Receiver - $500 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage (1972-1974) Pioneer Stereo Receiver

item.title: Kenwood Vintage KR-3030 Stereo Receiver - $200 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood KR-3030 Stereo Receiver Made

item.title: Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 Channel Stereo/Surround Receiver - $99 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 channel receiver. 100 watts on all 5 channels. Powerful and sounds excellent. Has a phono section for your turntable. Very nice cosmetic condition and works great. Remote control works well and has no corrosion in the battery compartment. Fully tested. I can demo it in my garage. Owner's manual available online. Nice receiver for $99 firm.

item.title: Hitachi SR-604 AM/FM Stereo Receiver - $149 (Cranston)
item.description: Gorgeous Hitachi SR-604 AM/FM stereo receiver in fantastic condition, works perfectly and sounds fantastic. From 1979 and very beautiful. 35 watts per channel. Has phono input for your turntable. Class G amplifier. I can demo it in my garage. Awesome receiver for $149 firm.

item.title: NAD T 753 Stereo Surround AM/FM Receiver - $89 (Cranston)
item.description: High quality NAD T753 6 channel surround sound receiver. Has Front, Surround, rear surround and center channel speaker outputs. Also great for normal 2 channel stereo usage. Has outputs for 2 subwoofers. Can run a second pair of stereo speakers even with all surround channels used. 70 Watts per channel x 6 channels. Remote control works except for volume down button. This receiver is powerful and sounds excellent. I can demo it in my garage. Good deal at $89 firm.

item.title: Pioneer SX-6 System - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: Complete package

item.title: STEREO ELECTRIC MISTRESS - $100
item.description: New in the box w/ power supply. Will also work with any regular (9 volt center neg. supply).

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Vintage JVC Turntable - $175 (Dartmouth)
item.description: I am selling this 1970s JVC model VL-5 turntable that has not been used for many years. Any questions text or call 508-287-969

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.title: NAD 7255PE AM/FM Stereo Integrated Amplfier - $125 (Cranston)
item.description: The NAD 7225PE is an integrated amplifier with AM/FM stereo tuner introduced in 1988. Features 25 W per channel, two sets of speaker outputs, built-in phono preamp for a turnable connection. Output was measured to be ~32 - 36W per channel and sounds great!

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Sherwood RA-1145R stereo - $25 (Warwick)
item.description: Sherwood RA-1145R

item.title: Audio Technica AT-Lp60x turntable - $40 (Ashaway)
item.description: Audio Technica AT-LP60X Fully Automatic Turntable. In good cosmetic and functional condition. Switchable phono preamp to connect to a Line-In on a receiver or to upgrade with an external phono preamplifier.

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $30 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: NAD 50 Watt per Channel AM/FM CD Receiver with Remote - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful NAD L53 Receiver that plays CDs and has AM/FM tuner. It also plays DVDs but has no HDMI out so only hooks up to older TVs. Works great for music. 50 watts per channel and sounds great. Remote control, AM antenna and owners manual included. Works perfectly. I can demonstrate it in my garage. Cool unit for $49 firm.

item.title: Target Audio TTW1 Turntable Wall Shelf - $150 (Cranston)
item.description: This Target Turntable Wall Shelf is a great way to isolate your turntable from vibrations and prevent foot-fall skips. Brand new and never installed. The spiked wooden shelf dimensions are 14" deep by 18.25" wide. Great deal for $150 firm.

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $300 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Kenwood 999X Stereo Speakers - $600 (Exeter)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood, 999X 300 W stereo speakers in great condition. All working 5 way speakers with nice condition cabinets from 1980 Germany.

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Integra DTR-5.4 Receiver with 2 Polk Dynamic Tower Speakers - $300 (Warren, RI)
item.description: The Integra DTR-5.4 is an A/V home theater receiver supporting 6.1-channel surround sound, Dolby and Dolby Digital formats, and featuring an integrated digital tuner with AM/FM modes.

item.title: Long range FM antenna for stereo - $35 (Coventry)
item.description: This is a folding FM roof or attic mount antenna. It is folded in the picture and is about 4 feet long and 4 feet wide when opened. Has never been outdoors, always was mounted in my attic. Picked up station approximately 75 miles away (Boston) areas.

item.title: Onkyo rack system - $220 (Tiverton)
item.description: Audio Video Control amplifier,

item.title: SONY STR-7045 Classic vintage receiver - Restored! - $600 (Bristol)
item.description: Here is a popular and sort after SONY STR-7045 AM/FM reciever. (much the same as the STR-6055)

item.title: Onkyo TX-SR501 Receiver - $20 (Exeter)
item.description: Sold as-is. Not the nicest thing, but plays music. Comes with remote.

item.description: Guitar Hero Les Paul Wireless Dongle USB Receiver

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.title: Victrola turntable 6 in 1 - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: Victrola 6-in-1 Turntable, a multimedia center designed to play various audio formats with a vintage aesthetic

item.title: Gemini TT-900WW bluetooth turntable - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: Gemini TT-900WW Modern Bluetooth Turntable System.

item.title: Sherwood RX-4103 Receiver - $30 (Exeter)
item.description: Receiver looks and performs great. Very clean and powerful. No remote. The receiver can be purchased alone for $30, or $50 with the Cambridge Soundworks MC200 speakers shown.

item.title: Hosa CMP-153 Stereo Breakout Cable - 3.5mm TRS Male to Left and Right - $5

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.description: Brand new in unopened box

item.title: Zenith record player circle of sound turntable modern model Z565 - $350 (Seekonk)
item.description: Vintage zenith turntable record player. Has amp built in, just add speakers. Mid century modern shabby chic. If you are going to play vinyl, do it with style.

item.title: Sony Multi Channel AV receiver - $300 (Woonsocket)
item.description: It's barely used and is two years old. It comes with a remote and a wire. It's a very heavy.

item.description: Original owner, used only twice, ended up I didn't need it.

item.description: EXCELLENT CONDITION!

item.title: 5 Transformers from the 1980s, Soundwave + 3-4 cassettes - $85 (Seekonk)
item.description: Soundwave Cassette player and two of his companion cassettes Buzzsaw, Laserbeak and Frenzy. Top of Soundwave's eject button is cracked off but still functions. Also including a Rumble character with one leg broken.

item.title: Get those unique Syth sounds: MODX6+ Yamaha - $1,175 (Waterford)
item.description: Like New: Only two years and four months old. Never played out. Hardly used. Comes with original box, manual and power supply. Call Lou [22]show contact info or cell [23]show contact info .

item.title: Kenwood KR-7400 - $200 (Bristol)
item.description: Selling my Kenwood KR-7400 vintage receiver.

item.title: KEF PSW2150 Subwoofer & HTS2001 Satellite Speakers - $79 (Cranston)
item.description: Awesome KEF PSW2150 10" subwoofer and 10 KEF HTS2001 satellite speakers. Not all satellites have the stands. Only 5 pictured but I have 10. The satellites are known for their crisp, clear sound and excellent vocals. Subwoofer is nice and powerful. This is a great sounding set up for stereo and surround sound. very good condition. $79 for everything is a great deal.

item.title: KS-A16K JVC - $40 (North Providence)
item.description: Ks-a16k jvc Stereo power Amplifier new in box. If you have any questions feel free to contact me.

item.title: Korg CR4 - $450 (Providence RI)
item.description: Korg CR4 multi track cassette deck recorder in excellent cosmetic and working condition, comes with adapter, located in music room at Big Top flea market 120 Manton Av.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $70 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $15,500 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: Yamaha K60 - $80 (Coventry)
item.description: Yamaha K60 double cassette deck with Dolby B and C noise reduction. In excellent condition. Not auto reverse originally purchased directly from Yamaha

item.title: Marantz SR5013 - $400 (North Kingstown)
item.description: Marantz SR5013 7.2-channel AV receiver. It's in excellent condition and works flawlessly. This is a powerful and high-quality receiver known for its great sound, video processing, and support for modern home theater setups.

item.title: Rotel RB-1050 Power Amplifier - $200 (Northkingstown)
item.description: Selling a Rotel RB-1050 stereo power amplifier for $200. This is a well-regarded, high-quality amp known for delivering clean, dynamic sound. Ideal for an audiophile setup or home theater system.

item.title: TOSHIBA VCR - $125 (Attleboro)
item.description: TOSHIBA DVD/VIDEO CASSETTE RECORDER

item.title: korg 168RC Digital Mixer - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: one of a kind Korg digital mixer with 2 xlr and 6 1/4" inputs, plus 2 lightpipe (toslink) in/out connections ( 8 channel ) providing 16in 16out over digital, stereo out for mains, stereo out for aux monitor plus headphone out

item.title: Roland AC-60 Acoustic Chorus Guitar Amplifier and PA - $250 (Charlestown)
item.description: If you are reading this ad, the item is still available.

item.title: Magnavox concert grand - $900 (Barrington)
item.description: 1959 Magnavox concert grand. This was electronically restored before I bought it six years ago. Sounds absolutely incredible. The turntable will need some work. Currently stuck on one speed and manual.

item.title: 2008 Honda Goldwing - $7,200 (Woonsocket)
item.description: 2008 Gold Wing, Navigation, cruise control, reverse, 1800cc, 6 cylinder, new tires in 2024, stereo, 2 cup holders, heated seats and grips, currently registered and inspected, currently being used weekly, 2 full face helmets included, garaged, clean title

item.title: Epic Yard Sale!!!!! (North Kingstown, RI)
item.description: On Saturday September 13, 8-1, at 51 Harrison St. in North Kingstown. Please no early birds this time. Kitchen items, pocket knives, high-end watches ($100 and up), Generac generator, Oriental rugs, stereo equipment, sporting goods, tools, clothes, etc. Looks to be SUPERCALIFRAGILISTIC!!

item.description: Used- Very Good Condition Mid 90's JCM900 1960 412 Cabinet. Loaded with 75 watt Celestion speakers.

item.title: Radio control cosair airplane - $80 (Tiverton)
item.description: Great planes corsair radio control airplane receiver ready uses 2200 lipo battery has plug in landing gear never used.

item.title: Radio control airplane - $75 (Tiverton)
item.description: This is a radio control airplane. Receiver ready never used . Made for 22 lipo battery , not included Local pick up only.

item.title: Multiple Audio/Visual components - $1 (TIVERTON)
item.description: Multiple Audio and visual components:

item.title: Vtg 80's Ghetto Blaster Boom Box GE Dual Cassette Radio - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: 1 year ago I took the front cover off to try to fix the cassette players. Belts were missing, deteriorated. I bought new ones, but lost interest in putting this back to working condition. So here it is, with the cover open, with new belts in baggie waiting to be installed.I dont have time to figure it out. None of the electronics are un-soldered, just un screwed plastics.. Its just taken apart where the screws were. Vintage 80's Radio and equalizer all work fine.

item.title: Multi family sale (providence)
item.description: 8 plus familes on one site in Tiverton at 1728 Main Rd. The map may not be correct. Indoor and outdoor furniture, antiques, household goods, clothes, linens, toys(including 2 matchbox cases with cars), electronics, component stereos, hundreds of cds, dvd box sets, binoculars, bird feeders, and much more. TIVERTON

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $14,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: HUGE YARD SALE (Penbryn Ave, smithfield)
item.description: Huge yard sale... something for everyone... clothes, knick knacks, collectibles, fire trucks, baseball cards, hats, stereo equipment and speakers, tools, dungeons and Dragons, vintage toys, video games, consoles... and sooo much more!!! Penbry Ave in smithfield... come on by. Ask if you don't see something you're looking for as not everything is out.
